context: Tests whether the agent correctly implements the volume pricing database schema with the right table structure, column types, nullable fields, constraints, and indexing as specified in the skill.

checklist.name: price_tiers table exists
checklist.description: schema.sql contains a CREATE TABLE statement for price_tiers

checklist.name: price_tiers UUID PK
checklist.description: price_tiers.id uses UUID type with DEFAULT gen_random_uuid()

checklist.name: Nullable product_id and category_id
checklist.description: price_tiers.product_id and category_id are nullable (no NOT NULL constraint), referencing products and categories respectively

checklist.name: Nullable customer_group
checklist.description: price_tiers.customer_group is nullable VARCHAR (no NOT NULL constraint)

checklist.name: price_type CHECK constraint
checklist.description: price_tiers.price_type has a CHECK constraint limiting values to 'fixed' and 'percentage_off'

checklist.name: price_value NUMERIC type
checklist.description: price_tiers.price_value uses NUMERIC(10,2) type (not INTEGER or FLOAT)

checklist.name: priority column default
checklist.description: price_tiers.priority has NOT NULL with DEFAULT 0

checklist.name: Lookup index
checklist.description: A CREATE INDEX is present on price_tiers covering (product_id, customer_group, min_quantity)

checklist.name: price_lists table exists
checklist.description: schema.sql contains a CREATE TABLE statement for price_lists with name, customer_group, currency, starts_at, ends_at, is_active columns

checklist.name: is_active default true
checklist.description: price_lists.is_active has NOT NULL DEFAULT true

checklist.name: price_list_items table exists
checklist.description: schema.sql contains a CREATE TABLE for price_list_items with price_list_id FK, product_id FK, price, and min_quantity columns

checklist.name: price_list_items.price is INTEGER
checklist.description: price_list_items.price column uses INTEGER type (storing cents), NOT NUMERIC or DECIMAL

checklist.name: TIMESTAMPTZ timestamps
checklist.description: Timestamp columns (created_at, starts_at, ends_at) use TIMESTAMPTZ type (not TIMESTAMP without timezone)
